name: Sweet 'n' Sour Sauced Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 each Sm. Green Bell Pepper  (cut into strips)
recipeInstructions:
Slice the carrot thinly and use a bias cut.
Cut the pepper into strips.
1. Partially freeze the pork and slice it into bite-size pieces.
2. Preheat a 6-1/2-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 4 minutes.
3. Add the cooking oil and sesame oil to the dish, swirling to coat.
4. Add the sliced pork and cook, covered, on 100% power for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring every 30 seconds.
5. Stir in the carrot slices, pepper strips, and green onion. Cook, covered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes more or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Drain off any liquid.
7. In a 2-cup measure, stir together the brown sugar, cornstarch, water, red wine vinegar, soy sauce, and ginger.
8. Cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
9. Stir in the pineapple chunks and cook, uncovered, for about 30 seconds more or until heated through.
10. Toss the pineapple mixture with the pork mixture and serve with cooked rice.
